creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
I see that the updated port no longer installs test files.  Why was that decided?  Note that the TEST option remains in the port.  Have you tested the port with this option turned on?

Instead of depending on devel/llvm15, check if you can use the new USES=llvm.

Please use DISTVERSION instead of PORTVERSION if possible.

I see that this port bundles a shitload of dependencies.  That should be avoided if possible.  Please check if you can unbundle the dependencies.
